skills.name: jstack-adr
skills.description: Create or update a local markdown Architecture Decision Record (ADR) with typed context (engineering, design, team, codebase, org), discovery of adr/docs/adr folders, intake questions, and numbered filenames — writes only after confirmation.

skills.name: jstack-advice
skills.description: Strategic and design counsel—stakeholder-aware options, tradeoffs, and a clear recommendation. Use for leadership/EM/product/design dilemmas, prioritization of principles, 1:1 or exec prep, or when the user wants named perspectives (not generic brainstorming). Grounds in team KB and gbrain when configured; never invents org policy.

skills.name: jstack-announcement-review
skills.description: Review an announcement for tone, accuracy, and channel fit. Flag legal/PR risks if external.

skills.name: jstack-announcements
skills.description: Draft channel-ready or email-ready announcements from rough notes, respecting tone policies and internal/external distinction.

skills.name: jstack-ceo-brainstorm
skills.description: "Alias jstack:ceo-brainstorm — CEO persona + executive tone, then superpowers:brainstorming. Use when the user wants exec-lens ideation."

skills.name: jstack-computer-use
skills.description: Route computer-use requests — native macOS/desktop UI (CUA) vs web automation (jstack workflows, Playwright MCP) vs org YAML workflow definitions.
skills.whenToUse: User mentions computer-use, desktop automation, native app UI, macOS accessibility automation, ambiguous "automate my app", CUA, trycua, cua-driver, cuabot, sandbox, or choosing between browser and non-browser automation. Use before picking jstack-workflows or jstack-computer-use-cua alone.

skills.name: jstack-computer-use-cua
skills.description: Operate CUA (computer-use): Cua Driver (macOS AX + MCP), CuaBot (Docker + Xpra), Cua sandboxes (Python SDK / cloud CLI). Verbs: setup, test, execute, status, restart, destroy. Use when the user mentions cua, trycua, cua-driver, cuabot, computer-use, sandbox, macOS desktop QA, Electron, native app automation, MCP desktop control, TCC, or debug/QA repro outside the browser. Parent router: jstack-computer-use.

skills.name: jstack-counsel-review
skills.description: Multi-persona review (CEO/design/eng/QA) with synthesis and tensions. Not vote-counting by title.

skills.name: jstack-create-plugin-pr
skills.description: Open a PR to jstack.core or jstack.gusto using distribution.github from config; block secrets via path_deny_globs.
skills.whenToUse: Contributor has local changes and wants a PR against the configured core or gusto distribution repo.

skills.name: jstack-custom
skills.description: Execute a custom routine from config/routines JSON. If schedule JSON is invalid, return a fix, not a fake result.

skills.name: jstack-end-session
skills.description: End the current session: summarize, flush carryover items, optionally run eval hooks.

skills.name: jstack-engineer-report
skills.description: Generate an individual engineer report: shipped, WIP, blockers, next. No invented metrics.

skills.name: jstack-engineering
skills.description: Summarize engineering health: CI status, PR queue, flaky tests, revert risk from configured repos.

skills.name: jstack-engineering-health
skills.description: Summarize engineering health — CI status, PR queue, flaky tests, revert risk — from configured repos only.

skills.name: jstack-engineering-silo-scan
skills.description: Detect overlapping work — same files or similar tickets/PRs — from a Jira ticket or GitHub PR; confidence-thresholded; read-only unless user approves comments.

skills.name: jstack-eval-report
skills.description: Generate a 9-grid evaluation report with growth framing. Sensitive — mark manager-only if needed.

skills.name: jstack-executive-research-brief
skills.description: "Alias jstack:executive-research-brief — CEO lens + executive tone, then jstack competitive research for leadership."

skills.name: jstack-federated-search
skills.description: Multi-provider federated search — selects N backends (Jira, Notion, Slack, GitHub, Glean, Google, DuckDuckGo, gbrain, knowledge_base, etc.) from the user query or explicit flags; delegates one constrained subagent (or isolated tool sweep) per provider; merges hits, ranks relevance to the question, structures a single answer. Supports --raw to skip synthesis. Reads jstack.config.json mcp_servers and integrations; does not invent credentials.

skills.name: jstack-figma-handoff
skills.description: Load jstack Figma workflow guidance before design-to-code or MCP Figma work; chain to figma-use when the host provides it.

skills.name: jstack-granola-daily-summary
skills.description: "Summarize Granola (or meeting) notes into a daily digest."
skills.whenToUse: "End-of-day summary from meeting notes or Granola exports."

skills.name: jstack-granola-daily-summary-6pm
skills.description: "Scheduled variant of daily Granola/meeting summary (6pm cadence)."
skills.whenToUse: "Automated or scheduled daily summary workflow."

skills.name: jstack-healthcheck
skills.description: Run jstack doctor + integration smoke test. Classify: P1 broken, P2 degraded. Output one Slack summary line.

skills.name: jstack-incident
skills.description: Route incident requests to the main commander flow or retro sub-skill.

skills.name: jstack-incident-find-sme
skills.description: Rank subject-matter experts from Jira history + Slack presence for an incident description or incident id; config project scope.

skills.name: jstack-incident-oncall-summary
skills.description: Summarize on-call window from Slack channel + incident tool + schedule; group alerts; optional per-issue investigation; config-driven targets.

skills.name: jstack-ingest-all
skills.description: Run configured ingest_all skill+prompt chain for new artifacts; finish with GBrain when configured.
skills.whenToUse: User wants batch ingest of new transcripts/exports using the ordered ingest_all array in config.

skills.name: jstack-init-session
skills.description: Start a jstack session: set gbrain target (personal vs team), load sprint/timezone context, confirm integrations.

skills.name: jstack-intake
skills.description: Convert unstructured feature/ticket requests into shaped ticket fields. Split bundled requests into separate candidates.
skills.whenToUse: Also when shaping a feature idea, PRD snippet, messy notes, or Slack thread into ticket-ready fields (before Jira create).

skills.name: jstack-jira
skills.description: Route Jira requests to the right sub-skill (get, create, update, intake, transition, notify, append). Ask one question if ambiguous.
skills.whenToUse: Also when the user mentions tickets, issues, JQL, triage, filing bugs, sprint backlog, status transitions, or commenting on an issue.

skills.name: jstack-jira-append
skills.description: Append structured content (meeting notes, checklist, update block) to an existing Jira issue description or comment.

skills.name: jstack-jira-create
skills.description: Create a Jira issue from user input or intake payload, with dup-check and template pre-fill from config.

skills.name: jstack-jira-get
skills.description: Fetch Jira issues by key or JQL filter and return a structured table of status, assignee, priority, and links.

skills.name: jstack-jira-intake
skills.description: Convert raw text or a jstack:intake payload into Jira-ready fields (summary, description, AC, labels).

skills.name: jstack-jira-notify
skills.description: Draft a Slack or email notification about a Jira event (status change, assignment, comment) for user approval.

skills.name: jstack-jira-transition
skills.description: Move a Jira issue between workflow states after validating the transition is legal and required fields are set.

skills.name: jstack-jira-update
skills.description: Update fields or add comments on an existing Jira issue. Confirm before sensitive field changes.

skills.name: jstack-knowledge
skills.description: Route knowledge requests to intake, process, search, self-knowledge, team-knowledge, shortcuts, skill-finder, or ingest-all.
skills.whenToUse: Also for wiki/runbook search, doc Q&A from repo URLs, gbrain or Notion knowledge, note ingestion, deduping entries, or team knowledge graph.

skills.name: jstack-knowledge-intake
skills.description: Ingest raw text into a structured record (title, body, tags). Flag PII/secrets before storage.

skills.name: jstack-knowledge-process
skills.description: Deduplicate, merge near-duplicates, and set canonical links across gbrain/Notion entries.

skills.name: jstack-knowledge-search
skills.description: Look up answers from configured knowledge sources (local paths, doc URLs, GitHub repos) using jstack.config.json knowledge_base — cite sources; do not guess from general knowledge when a source list exists. For storing notes use knowledge-intake, not this skill.

skills.name: jstack-knowledge-shortcuts
skills.description: Bridge to gstack/superpowers skills for planning and QA. Link to prompts/shortcuts/, do not duplicate.

skills.name: jstack-manager-report
skills.description: Generate a manager rollup across teams without stack-ranking individuals.

skills.name: jstack-meetings
skills.description: Route meeting requests to the right sub-skill (prepare, transcribe, action-items, post-slack, etc.).

skills.name: jstack-meetings-action-items
skills.description: Extract action items with owner + due date from meeting notes. Output a checklist for Jira intake.

skills.name: jstack-meetings-granola
skills.description: Import Granola AI highlights and map bullets to Decisions, Open Questions, and Action Items.

skills.name: jstack-meetings-notion-highlights
skills.description: Insert meeting highlights into a Notion DB with title, date, participants, and transcript link.

skills.name: jstack-meetings-one-on-one-transcript
skills.description: Paired 1:1 prep and after-meeting notes from configured transcript sources; prefer Lattice MCP when enabled, else Notion private PE or 1:1 parent pages; always append AI attribution.

skills.name: jstack-meetings-post-slack
skills.description: Draft a meeting summary for a Slack channel with tone from prompts/tones/. Do not post without user approval.

skills.name: jstack-meetings-prepare
skills.description: Build a 1-page meeting prep brief from calendar context, Jira in-progress items, and blockers for attendees.

skills.name: jstack-meetings-store-note
skills.description: Route meeting notes to personal or team storage based on session gbrain target.

skills.name: jstack-meetings-store-personal
skills.description: Save meeting notes to personal gbrain. Never auto-post to team channels.

skills.name: jstack-meetings-store-team
skills.description: Save meeting notes to team gbrain or Notion per config. Follow team storage rules.

skills.name: jstack-meetings-transcribe
skills.description: Convert meeting audio/video to text via approved transcription patterns. Mark [inaudible] and redact PII for public summaries.

skills.name: jstack-metrics
skills.description: Route metrics requests to my-metrics or team-metrics.

skills.name: jstack-morning-kickoff
skills.description: Config-driven morning routine — ordered jstack skill steps with PASS/FAIL/SKIP/BLOCKED, markdown checklist, on_fail stop|continue|ask; not browser workflow runner.

skills.name: jstack-my-metrics
skills.description: Personal throughput and review latency from GitHub/Jira. No peer comparison unless user is a people manager.

skills.name: jstack-notion
skills.description: Route Notion requests to the right sub-skill (adr, article, sprint, report, etc.). Ask one question if ambiguous.

skills.name: jstack-notion-adr
skills.description: Create or update an Architecture Decision Record in Notion with numbering, status, and superseded links.

skills.name: jstack-notion-article
skills.description: Create a Notion article (blog/eng journal) with title, audience tag, and Draft status until approved.

skills.name: jstack-notion-knowledgebase
skills.description: Add or update a knowledge-base entry in Notion with tags, deduplicating on title+topic.

skills.name: jstack-notion-one-on-one
skills.description: Create or update a 1:1 page in Notion with date, topics, and action items using templates/notion/one-on-one.json; respects private-manager defaults.

skills.name: jstack-notion-performance
skills.description: Create or update a performance cycle page in Notion (goals, impact, growth, feedback summary) using templates/notion/performance.json; metadata only in core.

skills.name: jstack-notion-planning
skills.description: Create or update a roadmap / OKR planning page in Notion, linking to Jira epics when ids are available.

skills.name: jstack-notion-project
skills.description: Create or update a Notion project profile page: stakeholders, RAG status, and links to Jira/comms.

skills.name: jstack-notion-report
skills.description: Create a long-form report page or DB row in Notion. Set Status to Draft until user reviews.

skills.name: jstack-notion-setup
skills.description: Build a Notion team HQ + private vault tree from the typed template catalog. Surface-aware: team-side artifacts must land inside a Notion teamspace (via anchor page), private vault stays workspace-private. Wires all ids back into jstack.config.json.

skills.name: jstack-notion-sprint
skills.description: Create or update a sprint page in Notion with goal, scope, and Jira sprint id when provided.

skills.name: jstack-notion-standup
skills.description: Create or update a standup page or database row in Notion using templates/notion/standup.json and optional gallery template page from config.

skills.name: jstack-notion-team-report
skills.description: Create or update a week-over-week team report page in Notion using templates/notion/team-report.json; hand off from jstack:reports-team-report.

skills.name: jstack-notion-teamnote
skills.description: Create a lightweight team note in Notion. Suggest ADR for binding decisions instead.

skills.name: jstack-notion-update
skills.description: Patch named properties on an existing Notion page. Return the view URL after update.

skills.name: jstack-pe-report-context
skills.description: Validate and normalize PE / team report JSON against schemas/pe; gate skills until pe.configured is true.
skills.whenToUse: Building or validating performance/team report context JSON before render or Notion/ HTML publish.

skills.name: jstack-prioritize
skills.description: Rank a list using RICE, WSJF, value/effort, or a user-provided rubric. Show scores and cutline.

skills.name: jstack-project
skills.description: Cross-surface project status (Notion/Jira): RAG health, 3 risks, 3 asks, milestone table.

skills.name: jstack-project-report
skills.description: Generate a stakeholder 1-pager: RAG status, milestones, risk register snapshot.

skills.name: jstack-project-review
skills.description: Review a project update for schedule, scope, risk, and stakeholder issues. Factual errors vs strategy issues.

skills.name: jstack-recon
skills.description: Read-oriented sweep across configured Slack, Jira, and similar integrations to answer "what needs attention"—P1s, stale work, open questions, and standup-ready action items. Produces a bounded summary plus an explicit action_items count line for evals. Does not open tickets, post to Slack, or change external state unless a different skill is invoked after user approval.

skills.name: jstack-report-design
skills.description: Map org brand to semantic report tokens (colors, type, radius) for static HTML shells and jstack report render.
skills.whenToUse: User wants report HTML/PDF to match brand; configure reports.branding and related defaults.

skills.name: jstack-reports
skills.description: Route report requests to the right sub-skill (team, engineer, manager, project, self, eval).

skills.name: jstack-research
skills.description: Route research requests to the right sub-skill (technical, competitive, user, spike, explain-codebase).

skills.name: jstack-research-competitive
skills.description: Competitive analysis with comparison table. Treat public info as potentially stale; never claim private competitor metrics.

skills.name: jstack-research-explaincodebase
skills.description: Map a codebase top-down: entry file, packages, main flows, then one deep dive the user requested.

skills.name: jstack-research-spike
skills.description: Time-boxed technical spike: hypothesis, method, go/no-go criteria up front. Report findings even if spike fails.

skills.name: jstack-research-technical
skills.description: Structured technical investigation: architecture options, tradeoff matrix, recommendation with migration/operability risks.

skills.name: jstack-research-user
skills.description: Synthesize user interview themes with verbatim quotes (permission-aware). Distinguish frequent vs loud users.

skills.name: jstack-retro
skills.description: Facilitate a blameless retrospective: timeline, impact, what went well, improvements, actions with owners and dates.

skills.name: jstack-review
skills.description: Route review requests to project-review, announcement-review, or counsel-review.

skills.name: jstack-review-code-review
skills.description: PR workflow — seek (find review queue), appraise (file-by-file review with draft comments), polish (pre-push self-review vs default branch).

skills.name: jstack-routines
skills.description: Route to the right routine sub-skill (standup, weekly-digest, sprint-close, health-check, custom).

skills.name: jstack-scaffold
skills.description: "Scaffold a new skill or plugin using org conventions and checklists."
skills.whenToUse: "User wants to create a new skill pack or plugin structure."

skills.name: jstack-sdlc
skills.description: Map SDLC stages to evidence (tests, sign-offs, flags, migrations). Produce gate checklists, not Jira state changes.

skills.name: jstack-self
skills.description: Route personal productivity requests to the right sub-skill (diary, lookback, focus, eval, remember, tasks, explain).

skills.name: jstack-self-brag
skills.description: Daily or weekly activity brag from Slack, GitHub, and Jira mapped to config-defined impact dimensions; parallel gather; tiered PR labels; personal gbrain by default.

skills.name: jstack-self-diary
skills.description: Write a single journal entry to personal gbrain. Never auto-post to team channels.

skills.name: jstack-self-eval
skills.description: Self-assessment on a 9-grid with one growth goal for next 2 weeks. Not formal HR input unless user says so.

skills.name: jstack-self-explain
skills.description: Short narrative of recent work for PR descriptions or standup, tying commits to user impact.

skills.name: jstack-self-focus
skills.description: Synthesize 2-3 focus blocks from tasks + gbrain, one explicit non-goal, and a timebox suggestion.

skills.name: jstack-self-impact-prep
skills.description: IC impact prep — Growth Check-in (quick) or Quarterly sweep with artifact gather, gap questions, config rubrics; personal gbrain default.

skills.name: jstack-self-knowledge
skills.description: Link personal GitHub activity and gbrain entries. No scraping private repos without token scope.

skills.name: jstack-self-lookback
skills.description: Review last N days of personal gbrain + calendar and surface patterns. Gentle, not therapeutic.

skills.name: jstack-self-remember
skills.description: Store a durable personal fact or decision in gbrain. Refuse or rotate if the user pastes a secret.

skills.name: jstack-self-report
skills.description: Generate a self-authored accomplishments narrative for performance context. User-editable voice.

skills.name: jstack-self-tasks
skills.description: Roll up personal tasks from Jira + gbrain TODOs. Deduplicate and return top 5 with a parking lot.

skills.name: jstack-session
skills.description: Route to session init or end.
skills.whenToUse: Also when starting or ending a jstack session, choosing personal vs team gbrain target, or wrapping up with a session summary.

skills.name: jstack-setup
skills.description: First-time jstack onboarding: run jstack setup wizard, create config, validate with jstack doctor. No secrets in chat.
skills.whenToUse: Also for first-time install, onboarding, jstack doctor failures, MCP setup, or fixing missing jstack.config.json.

skills.name: jstack-share-html-publish
skills.description: Publish or download HTML via a share-some-html style MCP (update/get) or JSON-RPC curl fallback; writes all artifacts under a config-defined directory (default /tmp). Optional access password when the server supports it.

skills.name: jstack-skill-creator
skills.description: Create or revise jstack plugin skills (SKILL.md) using repo conventions, Anthropic-aligned directives, and config-first rules. Use when adding capabilities, forking a skill, or fixing discovery/failure coverage — not for running product workflows.

skills.name: jstack-skill-finder
skills.description: Map vague user goals to specific jstack skills; prefer CLI skills index and domain routers.
skills.whenToUse: User asks how to do something or which jstack skill to use; keep answers to 1–3 skills with rationale.

skills.name: jstack-sop
skills.description: Route SOP requests to expectations or resources sub-skill.

skills.name: jstack-sop-expectations
skills.description: Maintain role expectations docs: what success looks like, autonomy boundaries, escalation paths.

skills.name: jstack-sop-resources
skills.description: Maintain resources docs: on-call, tools, how to get unblocked, SLA references.

skills.name: jstack-sprint
skills.description: Sprint-level orchestrator: planning and mid-sprint re-plan from capacity, goals, and Jira.

skills.name: jstack-sprint-planning
skills.description: Sprint planning: capacity, commit vs goal, spill from last sprint with root causes.

skills.name: jstack-sprint-prep
skills.description: Pre-refinement prep — curate needs-refinement queue vs sprint goals, flag stale work, suggest new tickets for gaps, priority order draft.

skills.name: jstack-sprint-refinement
skills.description: Refinement ceremony — five questions per ticket, capacity snapshot, sprint-ready checklist; no bulk Jira writes without confirmation.

skills.name: jstack-sprintclose
skills.description: Sprint close routine: velocity, spill, carry, retro hook. Do not fabricate demo links.

skills.name: jstack-standup
skills.description: Generate standup content: yesterday/today/blocked from Jira+Slack. 3 bullets max per person. Draft only.

skills.name: jstack-task-intake
skills.description: "Config-driven task intake wizard — from idea to ticket, sizing, prioritization, and optional announcements."
skills.whenToUse: "User asks to intake work, run a task wizard, size/prioritize, or announce a project."

skills.name: jstack-team
skills.description: Team snapshot: roster, on-call, sprint goal, dependencies. No individual performance color.

skills.name: jstack-team-knowledge
skills.description: Build the team knowledge graph: link issues, ADRs, runbooks. Suggest hubs and flag stale pages.

skills.name: jstack-team-metrics
skills.description: Team DORA-style signals with caveats for sample size. Separate unplanned work % when labels exist.

skills.name: jstack-team-report
skills.description: Generate a weekly team report: velocity, risks, dependencies, and 3 asks to leadership.

skills.name: jstack-transcripts-ingest
skills.description: Ingest new transcript files from Google Drive (or paste) into meetings pipeline; classify source and route to child skills.
skills.whenToUse: New meeting transcripts arrived in Drive or user pastes a file; route to highlights, transcribe, or action-items flows.

skills.name: jstack-update-config
skills.description: Edit jstack.config.json with validation against config/schema.json. Show diff and rollback one-liner.

skills.name: jstack-visual-single-page-html
skills.description: Build one standalone HTML file with React, Tailwind 4-style tokens, Chart.js/D3 via CDN, shadcn-compatible CSS themes, citations to design theory, report IA hierarchy, and typographic markdown rendering—not a Next.js bundle.
skills.whenToUse: User wants a single downloadable HTML dashboard, branded report viewer, slide-like page, or interactive viz page without a build step; mentions React Tailwind Chart.js D3 shadcn themes SPA CDN; asks for markdown on page with professional layout or report/presentation design.

skills.name: jstack-weeklydigest
skills.description: Generate a weekly digest: exec summary + links. Separate customer-facing section if two audiences.

skills.name: jstack-workflow-builder
skills.description: Design or update multi-step team workflows (chains, routines, policies, approvals) from sprint, comms, SDLC, and incident patterns. Produces chain markdown and config-ready snippets — use after install to customize the plugin without editing skills by hand. Not for one-off Jira tickets.

skills.name: jstack-workflow-execute
skills.description: Run a saved workflow via CLI; preview then run with --yes. Engine may be stub until Playwright is wired.
skills.whenToUse: After a workflow exists in config/workflows; user wants to run it from the agent or confirm CLI behavior.

skills.name: jstack-workflow-recorder
skills.description: Record user browser actions into a workflow definition. Add stability notes (selectors) before promoting to CI.

skills.name: jstack-workflow-runner
skills.description: Execute a workflow with jstack workflow run. Capture log + screenshot paths. Abort on first assertion failure.

skills.name: jstack-workflow-viewer
skills.description: Diff two workflow runs: timing, flakiness, visual diff summary. Do not assert pixel equality as pass/fail.

skills.name: jstack-workflow-wizard
skills.description: Multi-step choices to define a browser workflow; emits jstack workflow CLI commands.
skills.whenToUse: User wants to create or adjust a stored workflow and needs copy-pastable jstack workflow CLI steps.

skills.name: jstack-workflows
skills.description: Route workflow requests to builder, runner, recorder, viewer, **workflow-wizard** (interactive CLI command emit), or **execute** (confirmed `jstack workflow run`).
skills.whenToUse: Also for Playwright-style flows, browser automation YAML/JSON, recording steps, running jstack workflow, or comparing two runs.

skills.name: jstack-workflows-builder
skills.description: Build a workflow definition (YAML/JSON): start URL, steps, waits, assertions. No credentials in the file.
